'''tathuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocistatin|nocistatin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocistatin|nocistatin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tathuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæthirith|tæthirith]] || [[word:tæthirij|tæthirij]] || [[word:tæthirish|tæthirish]] || [[word:tæthiri|tæthiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathuthuruth|tathuthuruth]] || [[word:tathuthuruj|tathuthuruj]] || [[word:tathuthurush|tathuthurush]] || [[word:tathuthuru|tathuthuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathuruth|tathuruth]] || [[word:tathuruj|tathuruj]] || [[word:tathurush|tathurush]] || [[word:tathuru|tathuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathufruth|tathufruth]] || [[word:tathufruj|tathufruj]] || [[word:tathufrush|tathufrush]] || [[word:tathufruf|tathufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tathuruthu|tathuruthu]] || [[word:tathuruju|tathuruju]] || [[word:tathurushu|tathurushu]] || [[word:tathuruku|tathuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tathuruth|tathuruth]] || [[word:tathuruj|tathuruj]] || [[word:tathurush|tathurush]] || [[word:tathuru|tathuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tathuruthul|tathuruthul]] || [[word:tathurujul|tathurujul]] || [[word:tathurushul|tathurushul]] || [[word:tathurukul|tathurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tathuruthuthu|tathuruthuthu]] || [[word:tathurujuju|tathurujuju]] || [[word:tathurushushu|tathurushushu]] || [[word:tathuruku|tathuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tathuruthun|tathuruthun]] || [[word:tathurujun|tathurujun]] || [[word:tathurushun|tathurushun]] || [[word:tathurukun|tathurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tathuruthuoro|tathuruthuoro]] || [[word:tathurujuoro|tathurujuoro]] || [[word:tathurushuoro|tathurushuoro]] || [[word:tathurukuoro|tathurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
